meaning: n.<美>(厨房旁的)小餐室,小餐室的餐桌和椅子
examples: The elegant study in this 4-bedroom home provides quiet privacy from the big family room and adjoining dinette and kitchen.
One queen-size bed over the cab, and the sofa and dinette convert into double-size beds.
After inspecting the outbuildings, he drove six dusty miles to the town of Poxley, where he bought, on time, a bed, some chairs, a couple of tables, and a dinette set.
Wells Dinette is a must for foodies.
